Data Engineer.experience_emphasis: Companies primarily seek candidates with 3-7 years of experience in data engineering, often requiring a Bachelor's degree in a related technical field. Experience with large-scale data systems and strong problem-solving abilities are frequently highlighted.
Data Engineer.ideal_profile: An ideal Data Engineer is proficient in Python and SQL, capable of designing, building, and optimizing robust data pipelines and data warehouses on cloud platforms like AWS. They possess strong knowledge of data modeling, real-time data processing, and distributed systems, with a focus on data quality, scalability, and automation.

ML Engineer.experience_emphasis: Senior/Staff level, typically requiring 7+ years of experience in programming and algorithm development, with a strong focus on machine learning and related domains.
ML Engineer.ideal_profile: An experienced ML Engineer with a strong background in developing and optimizing machine learning models, particularly Large Language Models and 3D vision techniques, for complex, scalable, and real-time autonomous systems, leveraging robust cloud infrastructure.

AI Engineer.experience_emphasis: Typically 3-5 years for mid-level roles, with senior positions requiring 5+ years of experience.
AI Engineer.ideal_profile: A skilled software engineer with a strong foundation in machine learning and deep learning, proficient in Python and cloud technologies, capable of designing, building, and deploying scalable AI/ML systems, with a focus on MLOps and performance.

MLOps.experience_emphasis: Typically 5+ years in MLOps, DevOps, or Data Engineering; Lead/Manager roles often require 7-8+ years total with 3+ years in MLOps leadership.
MLOps.ideal_profile: An MLOps professional proficient in Python, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and CI/CD, capable of designing, building, and automating scalable ML model deployment, monitoring, and data pipelines.

Software Engineer.experience_emphasis: Mid to Senior level, typically 3-5+ years for general roles, and 5-10+ years for senior/lead positions.
Software Engineer.ideal_profile: An ideal candidate is a versatile engineer proficient in designing, developing, and optimizing scalable, reliable, and secure software systems, leveraging cloud platforms and distributed architectures. They possess strong problem-solving skills, collaborate effectively, and are adept at working with diverse technical stacks including Python, Go, and C/C++.
